creator: Studded@dal.net
text:
There is one last(?) reference to /etc/sysconfig in
/usr/src/release/sysinstall/help/configure.hlp.  At least according to my 'grep -iR
sysconfig *' in /usr/src. :)  

	Someone might want to do the same in -Current just to be sure.

Fix: Apply this teeny tiny patch. :)
